# SOURCE-SMU — Sales Mastery Unleashed

> **Pessoa:** Dan Kennedy (com Dave Dee & Nick Loise)
> **Programa:** Sales Mastery Unleashed — The No BS System for Closing Sales Like Crazy
> **Plataforma:** GKIC (Glazer-Kennedy Insider's Circle)
> **Tipo:** Multi-CD/DVD Training Program + Bonuses
> **Source ID:** DK-SMU
> **Data de Extração:** 2026-03-16
> **Elementos Extraídos:** 62
> **DNA Version:** 28.0.0

---

## VISÃO GERAL

Sales Mastery Unleashed é o programa de vendas completo de Dan Kennedy pela GKIC, co-apresentado com Dave Dee (host) e Nick Loise (GKIC Sales Manager). Cobre os 6 passos do No BS Sales Process, desde fundamentos até closing, com bônus sobre 19 Secrets of Exceptional Selling e uma call com Nick Loise sobre sistemas de vendas GKIC.

---

## ELEMENTOS POR CAMADA

### L1 PHILOSOPHIES (19 elementos: FIL-DK-609 → FIL-DK-627)

| ID | Título |
|----|--------|
| FIL-DK-609 | Marketing rarely finishes the job — 94% of commerce requires human sales |
| FIL-DK-610 | Top salespeople are writers and script masters — same as comedians |
| FIL-DK-611 | It is a false freedom to be left alone to roam unscripted |
| FIL-DK-612 | Non-scripted selling trainers have short careers — it doesn't work |
| FIL-DK-613 | Overcome objections in advance — smart people have money |
| FIL-DK-614 | The entire sales presentation should be assumptive — not jarring |
| FIL-DK-615 | Begin with the end in mind in sales |
| FIL-DK-616 | Cold prospecting is a stupid way to invest time |
| FIL-DK-617 | Don't sell if you're not 110% sold |
| FIL-DK-618 | Don't pre-judge prospects |
| FIL-DK-619 | Don't sell your way out of a sale — know when to shut up |
| FIL-DK-620 | Salespeople burn your money until productive — get them to day 2-3 |
| FIL-DK-621 | Career capital — every yes invests buyer's political capital |
| FIL-DK-622 | We are a nation of cynics — trust is broken at every level |
| FIL-DK-623 | Even the most sophisticated B2B sale requires triggering emotions |
| FIL-DK-624 | Post-sale romance is as important as the close |
| FIL-DK-625 | Risk reversal makes the offer irresistible |
| FIL-DK-626 | Recording salespeople is usually horrifying — but essential |
| FIL-DK-627 | Top 1% own the script plus control who they see |
